around.cascais_subtitle: A charming coastal town with beautiful beaches and historic mansions.

home.hero_subtitle: Experience the magic of the city of seven hills.
home.welcome_description: Lisbon is one of the oldest cities in the world and the oldest in Western Europe, predating other modern European capitals like London, Paris and Rome by centuries.

explore.title: What to See
explore.subtitle: Discover the most beautiful places in Lisbon, from historic monuments to creative hubs.

eat.title: Where to Eat
eat.subtitle: Savor the flavors of Lisbon, from traditional seafood to world-famous pastries.

about.title: About the Project
about.mission: Our mission is to provide travelers with the best information to discover the hidden gems and iconic landmarks of Lisbon.
about.description: This travel guide was created to showcase the beauty, history, and culture of Portugal's capital city.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message!

info.description: We are a team of passionate locals dedicated to showing you the best of our city. Whether you have a question about a specific spot or need travel advice, we're here to help.

footer.description: Explore the vibrant streets, rich history, and stunning viewpoints of Portugal's capital. Your ultimate companion for an unforgettable Lisbon adventure.
